hooks.command: node -e "const lines = ['', '='.repeat(60), 'HANDOVER REMINDER', '='.repeat(60), 'Before closing this session, complete the handover ritual:', '  1. Summarise what was done this session', '  2. List any open / in-progress tasks with exact state', '  3. Append errors to docs/ERRORS.md', '  4. Update docs/CHANGELOG.md', '  5. Note key decisions and their rationale', '  6. State the first action for the next session', '  7. Run: git status  (confirm clean or intentional state)', '='.repeat(60), '']; console.log(lines.join('\n'));"

node -e "const cmd = process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT || ''; if (cmd.includes('git commit') && !cmd.includes('--allow-empty')) { const checks = ['Before committing, confirm you have run:', '  npm run type-check', '  npm run lint', '  npm run test:run', '  npm run build']; console.error(checks.join('\n')); }"
